about.subtitle: An Elegant Stay
about.title: A Stay That Combines Comfort and Luxury
about.desc: We offer you a variety of rooms and suites carefully designed to give you a luxurious stay experience that combines tranquility, elegance and integrated services.

deluxe.title: Deluxe Single Room
deluxe.desc: An elegant, modern room designed to provide maximum comfort, featuring a comfortable bed, smart TV, private bathroom, and a fully equipped kitchen.

superior.desc: An elegant suite featuring a bedroom and comfortable living room, plus a fully equipped kitchen and a modern design that gives you a luxurious stay experience.

special.title: People with Special Needs
special.desc: We provide special facilities for people with special needs to ensure a safe and comfortable stay, including vibrating alert devices, a smart watch, and an emergency cord inside the rooms.

hero.title: Top Tourist Attractions in Jeddah
hero.desc: Discover the most beautiful destinations and attractions near AYA INN Serviced Apartments

card1.title: The Waterfront
card1.desc: The new Jeddah Waterfront is one of the most famous tourist and entertainment destinations in Jeddah, stretching over a large area overlooking the Red Sea and featuring a long promenade, green areas, family seating, and various restaurants and cafes.

card2.title: Al-Balad
card2.desc: Al-Balad district is known as the historic heart of Jeddah, characterized by its old alleys and traditional Hijazi houses with their famous wooden roshan windows.

card3.title: King Fahd Fountain
card3.desc: King Fahd Fountain is considered one of Jeddah's most famous landmarks and the tallest water fountain in the world, with a water jet height exceeding 300 meters.

card4.title: Al-Rahma Mosque
card4.desc: Al-Rahma Mosque is known as the floating mosque because it was built over the surface of the Red Sea, featuring a calm view and stunning Islamic design.

card5.title: Fakieh Aquarium
card5.desc: Fakieh Aquarium is considered one of the best entertainment places for families and children, featuring many types of marine creatures and enjoyable dolphin shows.

card6.title: Mecca Gate
card6.desc: Mecca Gate is one of the old historic gates that used to surround the city of Jeddah, and today it is one of the most important heritage landmarks in historic Jeddah.

card7.title: Obhur Area
card7.desc: Obhur Area is considered one of the most beautiful coastal areas north of Jeddah, famous for its private beaches, marine activities, and luxury resorts.

card8.title: Tayebat Museum
card8.desc: Tayebat Museum is one of the most important museums in Jeddah, showcasing Islamic heritage and ancient civilizations in a distinctive style.

hero.title: Discover a Different Stay Experience
hero.desc: Welcome to the AYA INN blog, where we share the best tips on accommodation and travel, the top tourist destinations in Jeddah, and everything that makes your trip more comfortable and enjoyable.

featured.title: How to Choose the Right Serviced Apartment for Your Stay?
featured.desc:
Choosing your accommodation is one of the most important factors for a successful trip, especially if you're looking for comfort, privacy and integrated services.

Before booking, make sure to check the location, cleanliness level, availability of basic facilities, internet speed, and proximity to important destinations.

At AYA INN Serviced Apartments, we offer an integrated stay experience that combines comfortable spaces, modern design, and a strategic location within Jeddah.

posts.subtitle: Blog Articles
posts.title: Everything You Need for an Outstanding Stay

post1.title: How to Choose the Right Serviced Apartment?
post1.desc:
Choosing the right apartment starts with identifying your needs, such as location, number of rooms, level of privacy, availability of basic facilities and ease of access.

It's always best to choose a place that offers integrated services such as fast internet, daily cleaning and parking to ensure a more comfortable stay.

post2.title: Best Destinations Near AYA INN
post2.desc:
The serviced apartments are located in a spot that provides easy access to the most important places in Jeddah such as the Waterfront, Obhur area and famous tourist attractions.

Plan your day ahead to make the most of your trip time.

post3.title: A Comfortable Stay for Families
post3.desc:
Choosing a suitable space for the family helps make the stay calmer and more flexible.

Family suites provide more space and a more comfortable travel experience.

post4.title: Why Do Many Prefer Serviced Apartments?
post4.desc:
Because they combine the comfort of home with hotel services such as cleaning, continuous support and modern facilities.

An ideal solution for both long and short visits.

post5.title: Tips Before Traveling to Jeddah
post5.desc:
Book early, prepare your schedule, and choose accommodation close to the places you plan to visit to reduce travel time.

Advance preparation makes the trip easier.

post6.title: How to Get a More Comfortable Stay?
post6.desc:
Choose a suitable room and make use of the available facilities such as internet and spacious areas.

Comfort starts with choosing the right place to stay.

tips.subtitle: Stay Tips

tip1.title: Choose Your Accommodation Location Carefully
tip1.desc: Make sure to choose a place close to services and important landmarks to reduce travel time and increase the comfort of your trip.

tip2.title: Plan to Book Early
tip2.desc: Booking early gives you more options and a chance to get the best prices.

tip3.title: Take Advantage of the Facilities
tip3.desc: Having a kitchen, internet service and parking makes the stay more flexible and comfortable.

tip4.title: Prepare Your Trip Schedule
tip4.desc: Identify the places you want to visit to enjoy every day of your stay.
